[vc_row][vc_column width=”1/6″][/vc_column][vc_column width=”2/3″]

Iron Ore Applications

For the iron ore industry Dr Kojovic was an advisor in the enhancement of lump iron ore production for both BHP Iron Ore and Rio Tinto Hamersley Iron. The work at BHP Iron Ore identified several changes that improved the overall lump to fines ratio. He also worked closely with North Limited and Hope Downs Management Services during their feasibility studies on new Marra Mamba iron ore deposits in Western Australia’s Pilbara region. River Iron Associates’ (Rio Tinto 53%) US$450m West Angelas mine was formally opened In August 2002. In April 2006, Rio Tinto and its joint venture partner, Hancock Prospecting Pty Limited, agreed to proceed with the development of the Hope Downs iron ore project at an estimated capital cost of US$590 million.

[/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/6″][/vc_column][/vc_row]
